title: Australia & New Zealand Standards
description: AS/NZS 4173 laser safety standards, Radiation Council requirements, and ILDA country classification system.
keyTakeaways: AS/NZS 4173 provides comprehensive guidance for laser safety in Australia and New Zealand
Each Australian state/territory has its own radiation protection legislation and requirements
New Zealand requires operator licenses under the Radiation Safety Act 2016
ILDA country categories help laser show operators understand international regulatory complexity
learningObjectives: Understand the AS/NZS 4173 standard structure and key requirements
Navigate Australian state/territory radiation protection requirements
Explain New Zealand's laser operator licensing system
Apply ILDA country categories for international show planning
